articles.title: Brayan Bello named midseason AL ‘Cy Yuk’ winner by The Athletic for poor first-half performance
articles.description:
“How could he not win this thing?”

The post Brayan Bello named midseason AL ‘Cy Yuk’ winner by The Athletic for poor first-half performance appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Brayan Bello received the midseason AL 'Cy Yuk' award for poor performance.
Bello's struggles included a 5.78 ERA in the first half of 2023.
This recognition raises concerns about the Red Sox pitching staff's effectiveness.
